Elena Torró

Hi, this is Elena 👋

I'm a Full-Stack Software Engineer born in Murcia, a Region in Spain where you can find delicious lemons and beautiful arid landscapes

I love building tech tools others can use, and that's one of the reasons why I've worked at SaaS technical products such as Tinybird and CARTO

I'm currently working at Kaleidos, the company behind Penpot, a web-based open-source design tool that bridges the gap between designers and developers.

I practice karate and indoor climbing several days a week, and I also enjoy paddle surfing when the weather permits
